The Two-Step Marketing Process:
What Is The Two-Step
Marketing Process?
Module 3 - Lesson 1

-- 1 of 6 --

It’s A Process By Which We Get
Targeted & Interested Prospects
To First Raise Their Hand And
Identify Themselves Before We
Begin The Extensive Marketing
Process (Funnel)
Module 3 - Lesson 1
The Two-Step Marketing Process:

-- 2 of 6 --

3 Main Reasons Why We Use A Two-Step Process:!
• To weed out prospects from “suspects”!
• To attract “the right” type of prospects into our funnel!
• To have the ability to follow-up with prospects
Module 3 - Lesson 1
The Two-Step Marketing Process:

-- 3 of 6 --

Module 3 - Lesson 1
The Two-Step Marketing Process:

-- 4 of 6 --

Module 3 - Lesson 1
The Two-Step Marketing Process:

-- 5 of 6 --

The Problem With The Typical Two-Step
Process Recommended and Used By Most:!
• It’s based on a flawed understanding of what the
Lead Magnet is and does!
• The typical Lead Magnet is an extra piece of
content/tool 	NOT 	tied to the marketing or sales
process!
• It often attracts poorly qualified prospects
(“suspects”) into your marketing funnel
Module 3 - Lesson 1
The Two-Step Marketing Process:

-- 6 of 6 --
